[Question]
What could be the possible causes of toothache?

commoncrawl
A possible cause of toothache can include cavities, gum disease, tooth fracture, or an infection. Tooth decay occurs when bacteria in the mouth produce acids that eat away at the enamel of the teeth, leading to pain and discomfort. Gum disease can also cause toothaches as it affects the supporting structures of the teeth. Additionally, a cracked tooth or an abscess due to an untreated cavity can result in severe toothache.

etermine if 2111159 is a prime number:

So, 2111159 is not a prime number.
